title: SG Fools
description: Not a good mod at all adds dumb stuff every april fools
body:
A mod for april fools focused on brainrot and being all over the place do not use this in a proper world and please dont do any of the stuff in this mod in real life.

this mod will not be maintained at all as im working on a way bigger mod also please join our discord.

we will update this every april fools though dont expect quality though.
